adguardian prints the error while typing it, which really should not be. There are crates for reading stuff from the user, also passwords, e.g. htt…

entry.content:
lissy93 merged lissy93/AdGuardian-Term#59 · May 31, 2026 06:42
Welcome screen data entry improvments, and API mem saftey #59

Several reliability and usability improvments

  • Hides user input for pass while typing for interactive setup
    • Fixes #57
  • Adds a lot of data struct …

entry.title: lissy93 closed an issue in AdGuardian-Term
entry.content:
lissy93 closed an issue in lissy93/AdGuardian-Term · May 31, 2026 05:34
Running Adguardian concurrently with an Update to AdguardHome causes severe system corruption #54
## Summary When adguardian runs concurrently with AdGuardHome's self-update process, critical system binaries are deleted from `/usr/bin`. The crat…
2 comments

also makes ci a bit faster, by only running the …
